scenes.name: land on visualizer
scenes.note: Let the viewer take in the dark stage, centered title, and the control bar with modes, palettes, aspect ratios, export buttons, and mic input.

scenes.name: start live input
scenes.note: Enable microphone input to bring the visualizer to life without relying on a file picker.

scenes.name: observe mic activation
scenes.note: Notice the canvas begin reacting and the interface shift from idle to live audio visualization.

scenes.name: switch to radial mode
scenes.note: Move from the default Bars view into a more dramatic circular composition.

scenes.name: observe radial motion
scenes.note: Notice how the visual response wraps around the center and feels more immersive.

scenes.name: change palette
scenes.note: Switch to another palette to show the instant color transformation across the active visualization.

scenes.name: observe palette transition
scenes.note: Notice the smooth palette lerp rather than a harsh color cut.

scenes.name: switch to portrait export ratio
scenes.note: Change the canvas framing to 9:16 to demonstrate social-ready composition.

scenes.name: observe 9:16 framing
scenes.note: Notice the stage recompose into a tall portrait layout suitable for loops and short-form video.

scenes.name: open particles mode
scenes.note: Show a second visual style with more motion and texture.

scenes.name: observe particles detail
scenes.note: Notice the denser, more atmospheric particle behavior reacting to incoming sound.

scenes.name: adjust response sensitivity
scenes.note: Increase the response smoothing control to demonstrate tuning how quickly the motion settles.
